what_changed: The diff excerpt reports `similarity index 100%` for all listed files, so the visible slice indicates no header content edits.
smart_moves: Kept the relocation as a rename-only change, making it easy to review and reducing risk of accidental declaration or ABI-affecting edits.
Moved the `lb` headers as a coherent group from `include/melee/lb` to `src/melee/lb`, preserving subsystem directory structure.
decomp_lessons: When changing repository layout, isolate moves from semantic edits so future reviewers and matching work can distinguish path churn from code changes.
Preserving file names and subdirectory structure during relocation helps keep include-path updates searchable and mechanically auditable.
For Melee-local headers, this PR is evidence that at least these `lb` headers were intended to live under `src/melee/lb` after the layout migration.
naming_conventions: The `lb` subsystem headers retained lowercase `lb*.h` names such as `lbanim.h`, `lbarchive.h`, `lbcommand.h`, and `lbvector.h`.
The placeholder-style unknown header name `lbunknown_001.h` was preserved during relocation rather than renamed in this PR.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: No assembly or matching tactics are evidenced in the slice; this was a 100%-similarity file relocation.
review_feedback: No issue comments, review comments, or reviews are present in the provided PR context.
